scripts.start: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const port = process.env.PORT || '3000'; const cmd = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'npx.cmd' : 'npx'; const result = spawnSync(cmd, ['next', 'start', '-H', '0.0.0.0', '-p', port], { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.ci: npm run test:ci && npm run typecheck && npm run build
